description: A container for serial processing of nodes

properties.note: UI-only layout hint. When true, children are arranged top-to-bottom (vertical). When false, children are arranged left-to-right (horizontal). Does not affect processing.

gaps.question: Confirm that ChainNode/DynamicSerialProcessor iterates children strictly in list order (index 0 first, last child last), passing the same in-place buffer through each child sequentially.
gaps.context: The serial processing order is the defining characteristic of chain. Need to confirm no reordering or parallel execution occurs.

gaps.question: ChainNode wraps DynamicSerialProcessor in bypass::simple. Confirm that when the chain is bypassed, audio passes through unmodified with no crossfade (hard bypass), and that reset() is called on the inner processor on bypass entry.
gaps.context: Distinguishes chain's hard bypass from soft_bypass's smoothed bypass. Users need to know bypass behavior per container.

gaps.question: Confirm that all children receive the same HiseEvent reference in list order. Does the first child's event modification affect subsequent children?
gaps.context: Event handling rules differ between containers (chain shares reference, split copies). Important for MIDI-processing nodes inside chains.

notes: The most fundamental container. Compiled version uses container::chain<ParameterClass, Processors...> with tuple iteration. Interpreted version uses bypass::simple<DynamicSerialProcessor>. All children share the same channel count (determined by the network/parent). The IsVertical property is purely cosmetic.
